_note: Victor accessed Campaign Manager today and made two changes: (1) auto campaign budget lowered to $10/day, (2) 'cat water fountain stainless steel wireless' bid increased. Search term data not yet pulled — recommended immediately.

victor_changes_today.bid_increased_keyword: cat water fountain stainless steel wireless
victor_changes_today.bid_increase_rationale: 4 consecutive weeks below 33.5% breakeven ACoS (30.8%). Correct move — scale the winner.

campaign_summary._note: Victor's changes cut estimated weekly ad spend from ~$210 to ~$105. Massive improvement. Full auto pause (EXP-025) would save another $70/week.

keyword_performance.keyword: cat water fountain stainless steel wireless
keyword_performance.victor_action: BID INCREASED — correct. 4 profitable weeks validates this.
keyword_performance._recommendation: Monitor next 7 days for impression/click increase. If ACoS stays under 35%, increase budget allocation here further.
Amazon's Choice badge may improve CVR on this keyword, bringing ACoS below breakeven. Hold bids for 1 week and re-evaluate after badge effect is measured.
Budget cut to $10 is an improvement. Full pause (EXP-025) saves the remaining $70/week. Amazon's Choice may make auto campaign more efficient now — monitor for 1 week before full pause decision.

keyword_performance.keyword: wireless stainless steel pet water fountain
keyword_performance._recommendation: Still needs to be paused. EXP-024 decision date is TOMORROW (Apr 18). This is $14/week saved with zero downside.

search_terms_analysis._status: NOT YET PULLED — Victor needs to download search term report
search_terms_analysis._priority: HIGH — do this while in Campaign Manager
search_terms_analysis._what_to_do: In Campaign Manager: Reports → Advertising Reports → Search Term → select last 30 days → Download CSV

negate_these: Any search term with $5+ spend and 0 sales — add as Negative Exact to Manual campaign
Generic terms like 'water fountain', 'cat fountain' (no 'wireless'/'cordless'/'stainless') — likely low-intent
Terms with 'cheap', 'cheap cat fountain', 'under $20' — wrong price intent
Competitor brand names appearing in auto campaign (e.g., 'FEELNEEDY fountain', 'PawPoll fountain') — waste
harvest_these: Any search term with 1+ sales and ACoS under 50% — add as Exact Match to Manual campaign
High-impression terms with 0 clicks (CTR under 0.2%) — study why and fix title/image
Any terms with 3+ clicks and 0 sales — add to negate list after 14 days
Surprising converts (e.g., 'dog water dispenser', 'pet water bowl wireless') — add as phrase match
_what_to_look_for._note: The search term report is the single most actionable data source in Campaign Manager. Pull it every time you're in there. The auto campaign especially generates unknown search terms — that's where waste hides.

search_terms_analysis._amazon_choice_impact: Amazon's Choice badge for 'wireless cat water fountain' means organic click share will increase. Watch for: (1) Session spike in next 7 days without PPC, (2) Organic CVR holding above 5%, (3) Lower cost-per-sale as organic lifts.

ppc_improvements_recommended.how: Campaign Manager → Reports → Advertising Reports → Search Term → last 30 days → Download
ppc_improvements_recommended.why: You made bid/budget changes — now find the exact terms that are wasting money and those that are converting secretly. This tells you exactly what to negate and what new exact-match keywords to add.

ppc_improvements_recommended.action: Pause 'wireless stainless steel pet water fountain' keyword — EXP-024 decision date TOMORROW
ppc_improvements_recommended.how: Manual Keywords Campaign → find keyword → Pause

ppc_improvements_recommended.action: Fully pause auto campaign (go from $10 to $0) — complete EXP-025
ppc_improvements_recommended.how: Close Automatic Campaign → toggle to Paused
ppc_improvements_recommended.why: Amazon's Choice badge now drives organic traffic. Auto campaign is redundant and wastes money on low-intent searches. The $10 budget still gets spent on bad terms.
ppc_improvements_recommended._note: Wait 3-5 days first — monitor if badge drives sufficient organic sessions before cutting all auto spend.

ppc_improvements_recommended.action: Add 'battery operated cat fountain' as Exact Match at $1.30 bid
ppc_improvements_recommended.how: Manual Keywords Campaign → Add keywords → Exact match → 'battery operated cat fountain' → $1.30 bid
ppc_improvements_recommended.why: 7,200 monthly searches. Amazon's Choice badge will help win the placement. High intent keyword that's currently untargeted.

ppc_improvements_recommended.action: Launch dedicated bundle campaign for B0GMDM6CG2
ppc_improvements_recommended.how: Create new Sponsored Products campaign: target 'cat water fountain bundle', 'fountain with filters', 'wireless cat fountain kit'. Budget $12/day. $1.10 bid.
ppc_improvements_recommended.why: Bundle margin is 43% vs 36% for fountain. One bundle sale generates $28.19 gross profit vs $18.13. Amazon's Choice on the main listing drives bundle discovery too. Time to push this.

amazon_choice_ppc_strategy._note: Amazon's Choice badge changes the PPC calculus significantly.
amazon_choice_ppc_strategy.immediate: Reduce auto waste (already done partially). Don't spend money on broad traffic Amazon's Choice is already delivering organically.
amazon_choice_ppc_strategy.scale: Put freed budget into Exact Match keywords — these are high-intent and the badge improves CVR so your ACoS naturally drops.
amazon_choice_ppc_strategy.watch: Sessions/day will climb as badge drives organic clicks. If sessions jump to 15+/day this week, organic conversion is working — you can reduce manual bid on 'wireless cat water fountain' broad match and let organic carry it.
amazon_choice_ppc_strategy.measure: In 7 days, compare sessions before/after badge. If up 50%+, consider pausing all broad match and keeping only exact match.
